trendNote: In June 2026, tech-focused dark mode designs are embracing vibrant neon-like primary colors paired with soft, glass-like surfaces for a futuristic yet approachable aesthetic. Glassmorphism remains dominant, with blurred cards and glowing accents creating depth and sophistication. Typography leans modern with clean sans-serifs like Inter, while animations are quick and subtle, reflecting a balance between energy and professionalism.
